output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, textwrap, itertools, math, statistics

# Load the provided files
quran_path = '/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

len(quran), type(quran)[:0]

import re
def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None: return None
    # remove diacritics
    diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = diacritics.sub('', s)
    # tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms: alef variants to bare alef
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ٰ','')
    s = s.replace('ٱ','ا')
    # remove punctuation (Arabic and English)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # lowercase not applicable; but ensure spaces collapsed
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def search_quran(phrase):
    norm = normalize_arabic(phrase)
    hits = []
    for rec in quran:
        norm_ayah = normalize_arabic(rec['ayah_text'])
        if norm in norm_ayah:
            hits.append(rec)
    return hits

original_span = "قُل لَّوْ كَانَ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَلَائِكَةٌ يَمْشُونَ مُطْمَئِنِّينَ لَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ مَلَكًا رَّسُولًا * وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِ مَّا كَانُوا بِهِ مُؤْمِنِينَ * وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ آمَنُوا وَاتَّقَوْا لَفَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَرَكَاتٍ مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَلَٰكِن كَذَّبُوا فَأَخَذْنَاهُم بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ"
search_quran(original_span)[:5], len(search_quran(original_span))

def find_containing(sub):
    norm_sub = normalize_arabic(sub)
    results=[]
    for rec in quran:
        if normalize_arabic(rec['ayah_text']).find(norm_sub)>=0:
            results.append(rec)
    return results

# Search for parts
part1 = "قُل لَّوْ كَانَ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَلَائِكَةٌ"
part2 = "وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِ مَّا كَانُوا بِهِ مُؤْمِنِينَ"
part3 = "وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ آمَنُوا وَاتَّقَوْا لَفَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَرَكَاتٍ"
hits1 = find_containing(part1)
hits2 = find_containing(part2)
hits3 = find_containing(part3)
(len(hits1), len(hits2), len(hits3)), hits1[:2], hits2[:2], hits3[:2]
find_containing("وَلَوْ أَنَّ أَهْلَ الْقُرَىٰ آمَنُوا وَاتَّقَوْا"), find_containing("لَفَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَرَكَاتٍ"), find_containing("وَلَٰكِن كَذَّبُوا فَأَخَذْنَاهُم")

# find verses containing "مؤمنين" and "ما كانوا"
cands=[]
for rec in quran:
    text=rec['ayah_text']
    if 'مُؤْمِنِينَ' in text and 'مَا كَانُوا' in text:
        cands.append(rec)
len(cands), cands[:10]
search_phrase("جئتهم بكل آية ما كانوا ليؤمنوا")
search_phrase("ولئن جئتهم بآية"), search_phrase("وإن جئتهم بآية"), search_phrase("ولو جئتهم بآية"), search_phrase("ولو جاءتهم كل آية ما كانوا ليؤمنوا")

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    an = norm(a)
    bn = norm(b)
    l = lcs_len(an, bn)
    # I'd compute 2*l/(len(a)+len(b)) or l/len(a)? 
    # Instruction says "normalized LCS or token F1". We'll compute l / len(orig_full).
    return l / len(an), l, len(an), len(bn)

cand_D = t1 + " " + t3
cand_A = t1 + " " + t2 + " " + t3
cand_B = t1 + " " + t_18_109 + " " + t3
